I am sorry for Writing again but after talking to my friends and a night of sleep, I wanted to ask for another appointment to make minor changes on my cat tattoo. This is no criticism of your work - the tattoo shows 100% the photo of her and its done perfectly, so please donât be angry about it! ð¥º it is really amazing work and Iâm very thankful about it. 
My problem is that my cat has a really round shaped furry head and for me this tattoo does not reflect it Completely, I assume because of the photo I choosed. 
I thought maybe we can improve this with making the ear bigger and adding a bit to the chin? I will send you a (Bad) drawing of Mine to show what I mean. And you could let me know what you think.
And of course I am Willing to pay for this, just to make that clear.

Hey Nadine ð¤ð¼
That sounds like such a beautiful idea! A heart shape with your cat inside can look amazing , especially in fine lines with soft black shading. Iâd really recommend keeping it in black & grey, because the colors of your cat wouldnât stay as clean and natural on the skin over time. With fine lines and soft shadows, we can create a very elegant and realistic result that will age beautifully.

When would you like to book your appointment? ð
